title: campanula pusilla var. pulchella
intro: Campanula pusilla var. pulchella is a rare and beautiful alpine bellflower plant, characterized by its delicate white or pale pink bell-shaped flowers and low-growing habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Campanula pusilla var. pulchella include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of coughs, colds, and indigestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Campanula pusilla var. pulchella often involve infusions, tinctures, or dried flowers, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for localized relief.
